# Codebase Indexer

Use when opening an existing codebase for the first time, or after completing a feature or bugfix — generates and maintains .codebase-indexer/docs/ index files so the agent does not re-sc…

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add codebase-indexer --to ./skills
```
